schema.title: Response Authed Health Health Authed Get

patch.description:
Update the caller's own preferences (Stage 7: glossary definition language). Self-scoped — a
user can only change their own row. New saves use the new language; existing entries keep theirs.

schema.title: Response List Users Admin Users Get
Response List Modules Admin Modules Get

get.summary: List Admin Module Sections By Week

schema.title: Response List Admin Module Sections By Week Admin Modules  Module Id  Sections By Week Get
Response List Module Members Admin Modules  Module Id  Members Get
Response List Sections Modules  Module Id  Sections Get
Response List Sections By Week Modules  Module Id  Sections By Week Get
Response Get Section Modules  Module Id  Sections  Section Id  Get

dueAt.description: Optional lab deadline set at upload time.

post.description:
8.6a mode entry: create (or resume) a mode conversation — homework_help only this stage. The kind
is set at creation and IMMUTABLE; binding rules + idempotency live in the service.

AnswerFeedback.title: AnswerFeedback
AnswerFeedback.description:
Immediate per-answer feedback. ``selectedAnswerOptionId`` is the ORIGINAL selected option, so a
duplicate submit (``alreadyAnswered=True``) returns the original result, never the resubmitted one.

AnswerForStudent.title: AnswerForStudent
AnswerForStudent.description: The post-answer result embedded on a question once the student has answered it.

AnswerSubmission.title: AnswerSubmission
AnswerSubmission.description: POST answer request — one question at a time.

AssistantAvailabilityResponse.title: AssistantAvailabilityResponse
AssistantAvailabilityResponse.description:
Whether the lecture assistant can be started for this section (decision 9).

``state`` ∈ {``ready``, ``processing``, ``unavailable``}. The UI shows "Start chat" only on
``ready`` and reuses the summary processing/unavailable treatment otherwise.

ConversationListItem.title: ConversationListItem
ConversationListItem.description:
One row of the Workspace conversation list (Stage 8.4). ``display_title`` is derived-on-read (the
manual title when set, else the lecture/lab title, else a mode-derived fallback) so old null-title rows
render with no backfill; ``grounding_chip`` is "Lecture grounded" for the lecture chat and a mode label
otherwise. Excludes soft-deleted AND access-revoked conversations (invariant C) — the list query is the
4.7 gate. 8.6c: time-management has no module/section/scope binding, so ``module_id`` and
``module_title`` are nullable for that mode only.

ConversationSaveSource.title: ConversationSaveSource
ConversationSaveSource.description:
Stage 8.5 — the discriminated assistant-chat save source. The student highlighted the term in a
completed assistant reply; the server verifies the message and derives subject/folder from the
conversation's bound section (never trusted from the client).

ExamPrepScopeSummary.title: ExamPrepScopeSummary
ExamPrepScopeSummary.description: A lecturer AssessmentScope as a student sees it (+ its current availability).

MistakeBankItem.title: MistakeBankItem
MistakeBankItem.description: One current-student mistake as shown in the module mistakes-bank.

ModuleScheduleInput.title: ModuleScheduleInput
ModuleScheduleInput.description:
Creation-time schedule (Stage 5.5, D1/D10). Course dates are calendar dates (YYYY-MM-DD),
never JS timestamps. weekStartDay defaults to Monday. sessionPattern drives generation; the quiz
day is recorded but generates no section here.

QuizAttemptForStudent.title: QuizAttemptForStudent
QuizAttemptForStudent.description: An attempt with its snapshot questions (no provenance, no isCorrect pre-answer).

QuizAttemptsSummary.title: QuizAttemptsSummary
QuizAttemptsSummary.description: The aggregate panel line (best score · attempt count) — NOT a paginated list (ADR-041).

QuizAvailabilityResponse.title: QuizAvailabilityResponse
QuizAvailabilityResponse.description: GET availability wire shape (Stage 5 HTTP contract).

QuizOptionForStudent.title: QuizOptionForStudent
QuizOptionForStudent.description: A selectable option. NO ``isCorrect`` — correctness is never serialized pre-answer.

QuizQuestionForStudent.title: QuizQuestionForStudent
QuizQuestionForStudent.description:
A question as the student sees it. ``answer`` is null until answered (then it carries the
correctness + explanation). No top-level ``explanation``/correctness pre-answer.

RecapScopeRequest.title: RecapScopeRequest
RecapScopeRequest.description: A recap span within one module — EITHER ``weeks`` OR a ``startDate``/``endDate`` range.

ScopeAvailabilityResponse.title: ScopeAvailabilityResponse
ScopeAvailabilityResponse.description: Whether a recap/exam-prep span is startable (D3 all-or-wait), and what is still processing.

SendMessageResponse.title: SendMessageResponse
SendMessageResponse.description: The user message (saved first) + the pending assistant reply the client polls for.

StudentMaterialMeta.title: StudentMaterialMeta
StudentMaterialMeta.description: Published learning material (the lecturer-uploaded asset) — same safe shape as Stage 3.

StudentSummarySlot.title: StudentSummarySlot
StudentSummarySlot.description: One slot's state + content. ``content`` is non-null ONLY when ``state == 'ready'``.
